examples: Think of "The Nutcracker" and you imagine chimes and snowflakes.
If Santana really wants this holiday program to compete with "the Nutcracker," she would be wise to spruce up the stage set.
For a species that was supposed to be eating a lot of abrasive foods, Nutcracker Man had teeth that showed very little sign of pitting.
Some revered "Nutcracker" productions say they're under pressure to compete with newer, edgier versions.
Still, the Oregon Ballet Theatre is set to retire its Balanchine "Nutcracker" in the near future.
